title: Texting My Son's Girlfriend | #shorts
full_text: Mom, are you kidding me? Are you kidding me? What? >> How could you do that? >> What? What did I do? What? >> You DM the girl I'm talking to. >> Yeah. So what? >> What? Are you joking? So what? >> I just slid in her DMs. That's what everybody >> That's not what you do. That's what I do. >> No, I do it, too. >> No, you can't. She's freaked out now. She's not responding to any of my messages. What did you say to her? >> Nothing. I Nothing. I said nothing bad. >> You said nothing bad. So she stopped talking to me because you said nothing bad. >> I just said, "Hi, how are you? Where you go to college? What was your SAT SCORE?" WHY WOULD YOU ASK HER what her SAT score is? >> Don't you want to know? I don't care. >> No. WHY WOULD I CARE ABOUT IT'S NOT YOUR place to ask. >> Why would you care? What do you care about then? >> I her personality things she's doing. >> Who cares about her personality? If she's dumb, you're going to be like, "Oh, her personality is >> You cannot DM her regardless." >> Yes, I can. I did. It's okay. I don't think so. I did anything wrong. >> Well, now she's not talking to me. >> I don't want to state the obvious, but I'm guessing it was like not a perfect score. You're welcome. You could say thank you to your mother. I'm never talking to you again. >> Literally, you kill yourselves for your kids in America and this is what happens. Fine. Next time I won't ask. Can I ask height and weight?
